x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A CLI (command line interface) version of the Intent Architect Software Factory.

commands.name: ensure-no-outstanding-changes
commands.description: Runs the Software Factory and if there are any outstanding changes it prints out an error and exits with a non-zero return code.

arguments.name: username
arguments.description: Username for an active Intent Architect account.

arguments.name: password
arguments.description: Password for the Intent Architect account.

arguments.name: isln-path
arguments.description: Path to the Intent Architect solution (.isln) file or folder containing a single .isln file.
